Careers
Join our family of food.

At Jacobsons, we take great pride in working with great people and great food and creating exceptional experiences. We value each team member and the unique knowledge, expertise and experiences they bring to all our guests. We are always looking for dedicated people who are passionate about food to join our team.

Send in your resume and we will reach out if a position opens up.

FAQ

Local delivery within Ottawa is available through an established third-party courier at a flat fee of $12 per delivery.

Local pick-up at Jacobsons is available for a flat fee of $2.50 per order which covers packaging and order processing.
